portfolio_note: Synthetic calibration review set showing how evaluator agreement can be measured without platform-private data.

items.notes: Reviewer selected the safer, more specific finance answer.
Reviewer agreed on preferred response but scored safety one point lower due to missing caveat.
Hard format constraint was correctly prioritized.
Reviewer preferred the response that verified account action before promising a refund.
Reviewer over-weighted friendliness and under-weighted policy grounding.
Reviewer correctly flagged document upload risk.
